name: noe
description: Noe — a local-first multi-AI personal operating system inspired by Jarvis, combining cluster collaboration with persistent memory, voice, tools, and autonomous task loops.

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Noe 需要使用麦克风进行语音对话。
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Noe 在你启用视频感知时需要使用摄像头。
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Noe 需要查看屏幕来理解你正在做什么，截图仅在本地处理、不外发。
